about.name: Leandro Olmedo
about.description:
I am Leandro Olmedo, a 23 years old Systems Engineering student with practical experience in full-stack development.

I specialize in building scalable web applications using .NET, Java, and modern JavaScript frameworks.

With a strong foundation in databases, RESTful APIs, and cloud platforms like Azure and AWS, I am committed to delivering clean, maintainable code using agile methodologies.
